modules.name: LINQ and Dependency Injection
modules.description: Advanced C# concepts including exception handling, extension methods, LINQ method and query syntax, and dependency injection with Ninject.

lessons.title: Getting Started
topics: Environment setup and prerequisites
Module overview and learning objectives

lessons.title: Exception Handling
topics: Try/catch/finally blocks
Custom exceptions
Best practices for error handling in C#

lessons.title: Weather Almanac — Exceptions (Exercise)
topics: Adding exception handling to the Weather Almanac application

lessons.title: Extension Methods
topics: Creating and using extension methods
When and why to use extension methods

lessons.title: LINQ Method Syntax
topics: Introduction to LINQ
Method syntax: Where, Select, OrderBy, GroupBy, Aggregate
Lambda expressions with LINQ

lessons.title: LINQ Methods Exercises
topics: Hands-on practice with LINQ method syntax

lessons.title: LINQ Query Syntax
topics: Query expression syntax
Translating between method and query syntax
Joins and grouping with query syntax

lessons.title: LINQ Syntax Exercises
topics: Hands-on practice with LINQ query syntax

lessons.title: Weather Almanac — Reporting (Exercise)
topics: Adding LINQ-powered reporting to the Weather Almanac application

lessons.title: Weather Almanac — Exceptions (Lab)
topics: Extended lab: comprehensive exception handling in Weather Almanac

lessons.title: Dependency Injection with Ninject
topics: Inversion of Control (IoC) principles
Configuring and using Ninject
Constructor injection patterns

lessons.title: Module Assessment
topics: Summative assessment covering exception handling, LINQ, and dependency injection

assessment.title: Module Assessment (M04)
items: Summative assessment covering all module topics
